pendingApplications.proposal: Change of use of 6 dwellinghouses (Use Class C3) to 6 Houses of Multiple Occupation (Use Class C4)

pendingApplications.address: 40 - 60 Queensway Town Centre Stevenage Herts SG1 1EE
pendingApplications.proposal: Change of use of part of ground floor retail unit (46 Queensway), second floor office units (40-56 Queensway) from Use Class (E) to residential Use Class (C3) to provide 26 flats. Extension of two additional storeys and creation of new bin store and rear access with associated external alterations.

pendingApplications.address: Land South Of A602/Land East Of Bragbury End Stevenage Herts SG2 8TH
pendingApplications.proposal: Full planning permission for the construction of the spine road, site accesses from the A602 and ancillary works. Outline planning permission for up to 500 dwelling units (including affordable housing and self-build plots), a mixed use local centre (Use Class C3, E and F2) space, public open and amenity space (including Children's Play), associated landscaping and ecological enhancement works, internal highways, parking, footpaths, cycleways, drainage, utilities, service infrastructure and ancillary works (With some matters reserved).
